# Alberto Di Maria

> AI Product Engineer and freelance AI developer based in Milan, Italy. I build AI voice agents and full-stack AI products end-to-end — from real-time voice pipelines to payment-grade web apps. This file is a machine-readable summary of my portfolio at https://albertodimaria.com.

## About
- Role: AI Product Engineer · agentic AI, voice agents & audio
- Freelance AI developer for music-business and other clients
- Based in Milan, Italy
- Strengths: voice agents (Twilio · ElevenLabs · Deepgram · GPT-4o), full-stack AI products (Next.js · Supabase · Stripe), Python automation, audio/ML (PyTorch · TensorFlow · RAVE · Essentia)
- Languages: English, Italian, Spanish
- Site available in English (/), Italian (/it/) and Spanish (/es/)

## Selected work
- [Beat Store](https://ffinnico.netlify.app): full-stack music e-commerce for a producer (Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Stripe, Cloudflare R2). Acquired, live. Hardened with tests + CI + observability (86% money-path coverage, Sentry).
- [Company Brain](https://company-brain-alberto.onrender.com): agentic AI over a company's live business data — FastAPI agent with tool-calling and zero-infra RAG; exact figures, source provenance, no hallucinations. Top 15 at the Cursor × Yellow Tech hackathon.
- [Ritmo Tropicale Voice Agent](https://dance-voice-agent-dashboard.vercel.app): 24/7 inbound AI phone assistant for a dance school — real-time voice pipeline (Deepgram STT → GPT-4o tool calling → ElevenLabs TTS) with barge-in. Evaluated end-to-end (6/6 scenario evals, p50 4.2s / p95 6.3s).
- Shy Order: autonomous voice agent that calls businesses on the user's behalf, handling the full phone conversation end-to-end (ElevenLabs, Twilio, FastAPI).
- Beyond Space: audio generation via RAVE latent-space interpolation (PyTorch, TorchScript, FastAPI, React).
- Geometry in Music (MSc thesis): pipeline from audio analysis to prompt-free music generation; comparative benchmark of generative models.
